The Benchwarmers (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,843,754Details
International Box Office $5,219,972
Worldwide Box Office $65,063,726
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $34,416,592
Total $34,416,592
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,656,429 (32.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:92.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,274 opening theaters/3,282 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $103,333,250

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 7th, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 11th, 2006 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: July 25th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and suggestive humor, and for language.
Running Time: 85 minutes
Franchise: Benchwarmers
Plot point: Baseball
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios, Happy Madison
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
